privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data via a Python setup script. The input document is created at /home/ga/Documents/Earnings_Release_Raw.docx, containing the headline 'Meridian Corp Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results'. The agent is expected to insert the dateline 'NEW YORK, NY – January 25, 2025 – ', format financial metrics ('Revenue', 'Operating Income', 'Net Income', 'Diluted EPS') into a table, and save the final document to /home/ga/Documents/Earnings_Release_Formatted.docx.
